holdings.infoBox: IGM is an equity ETF with a total of 293 individual holdings. The top holdings are Broadcom stock at 7.67%, Apple at 7.57%, NVIDIA at 7.34%, Microsoft at 6.24%, and Micron Technology at 5.73%.

overview.description: The iShares Expanded Tech Sector ETF (IGM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of US and Canadian technology companies. IGM was launched on Mar 13, 2001 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: S&P North American Expanded Technology Sector Index

data.title: Analysts Expect The iShares Expanded Tech Sector ETF Will Reach $253

data.title: Loup Ventures tracking the 'next wave' of innovation in new ETF
data.text: Gene Munster, Loup Ventures managing partner, discusses his firm's new fund, the Loup Frontier Tech ETF, that tracks innovation by technology companies with a focus on small-caps.
